title: mentha longifolia var. laevigata
intro: Mentha longifolia var. laevigata, also known as Horsemint, is a variety of mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is characterized by its broad leaves and purple flowers, which are often used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Horsemint include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Horsemint include relief from colds, coughs, and fever, as well as its use as an expectorant and to aid in digestion.
